payload.message:
Execute exactly one command from the GrokClaw repository root (the directory that contains AGENTS.md):

./tools/cron-core-workflow-run.sh grok-daily-brief grok

Do not call cron-paperclip-lifecycle.sh or cron-run-record.sh yourself; do not perform the daily brief in this turn—the orchestrator runs the agent turn and always records the terminal outcome and closes Paperclip.

Execute exactly one command from the GrokClaw repository root (the directory that contains AGENTS.md):

./tools/cron-core-workflow-run.sh grok-openclaw-research grok

Do not call cron-paperclip-lifecycle.sh or cron-run-record.sh yourself; the orchestrator runs the agent turn and always records the terminal outcome and closes Paperclip.

Execute exactly one command from the GrokClaw repository root (the directory that contains AGENTS.md):

./tools/cron-core-workflow-run.sh alpha-polymarket alpha

Do not call cron-paperclip-lifecycle.sh or cron-run-record.sh yourself; the orchestrator runs the agent turn and always records the terminal outcome and closes Paperclip.
